asset.title: Free Job Halo
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview effectively demonstrates collaborative spreadsheet updates triggered by chat commands and executed by agents, complete with trace logs.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows chat-driven spreadsheet updates and agent execution clearly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the initial state, the user command, and the updated spreadsheet values.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface, though the layout is highly dense.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's multi-pane workspace layout and agent trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Realistic financial data and agent interactions make it feel authentic.

legibility.evidence: Small text in the spreadsheet and logs may be hard to read on smaller screens.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and operations teams auditing data.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly displays agent execution traces and status updates.

observedEvidence: Agent chat responses and execution traces are visible

defects.observed: Dense UI text and small font sizes in the spreadsheet cells reduce readability at standard preview sizes.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the zoom level of the application UI during capture.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's agent automatically compute and sync spreadsheet variances directly from audited NetSuite notes.
